name: Reading your wife's mind
description:
You can read your reserved and conservative wife's mind, she's a freak.

...

You don't know why it started happening but one day you just woke up with mind-reading powers, you were scared to know something you didn't want to know but what you heard from her thoughts was... Weird. She's into a lot of kinks that you didn't even know she had.

Extra images:

Here

And here

This is the first time I ever make a smut character, I did a few fluff but none of them were inherently sexual, this one is.

That's all, see ya.

By the way, I recently added some extra messages, and I also remade the image with the current style I use now but I didn't want to change this bot's photo. Still, here it is:

She looks cute, even though she still has weird ass fingers.
